title: Create Thank You Page
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Predrag
description:
Please create a thank you page for ASAP Commercial Doors for their social campaign landing page. 

  • URL for the New Thank You page:
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp-thank-you/

  • Thank You Page to duplicate (Use the same layout and copy):
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/

  • Trigger for Thank you Page: Upon submitting the Booking form, from this landing page: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/

Pixel: Please ensure the attached pixel is placed on the page. 
https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/


Related discussion thread: https://3.basecamp.com/4226914/buckets/46000874/todos/9792866398



_______________________________________________________________________________________
 

The Client's Goal (Notes from related discussion post)

 

  •  The client wants a new Thank You page so that they can track potential customers who come to their social campaign landing page from Meta Ads. 

  • The client want us to add the Meta Ads pixel to their landing page so they can track the source of form submissions.

  • The client does not want to use the already existing Thank You page because it was created for a different campaign.

 

What We Need to Do


  •  Add the attached pixel to the landing page.

  • Create a Thank You Page for this social campaign landing page:  https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/

  • Create the new Thank You page by duplicating this old one: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/  

  • Use this URL for the new Thank You page:
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp-thank-you/

  • Add a Trigger for Thank you Page. Users should be taken to the new Thank You Page after clicking submit on the booking form on the landing page.



Duplicate the already existing Thank you page. 


The new Thank You Page should have the same layout and words as the old one.

Add a trigger to the Booking form, so users are taken to the new Thank You Page after submitting the Form.




After users click the "Schedule Now" buttons on the social media landing page, they are taken to a booking form (which is the contact us page).

 


We need to add a trigger / link to the new thank you page, so users are automatically taken to it after they click the "Send Message" button the booking form.

title: Update Team Photos and Employee Listings on NC and AZ Pages - Due 5/22/26
description:
Deadline: Due by Friday if possible.
 
Domain: asapcommercialdoors.com
Primary URL: Multiple pages — see requirements below

Summary: Erin Beasley (Creative Marketing Director) has submitted a request to update team photos and employee listings across four pages covering both the North Carolina (Charlotte) and Arizona locations. All replacement images are provided in a labeled Google Drive folder. Changes include replacing hero/team photos, removing specific circled employees, updating photos for Tasha and Andrew, and adding new employees as labeled in the Drive folder.

Client Goal: Update team photos and employee information across ASAP Commercial Doors' NC and AZ pages to accurately reflect the current staff at both locations.

Task & QC checklist for completion:
Requirements for Completion:
  • Team photo on https://asapcommercialdoors.com/charlotte/ is replaced with the updated image labeled for this page in the Drive folder




Employees labeled for removal are removed from https://asapcommercialdoors.com/charlotte/about-us/





Employees labeled for photo updates in the Drive folder are updated on https://asapcommercialdoors.com/charlotte/about-us/
 
  Employees labeled for addition in the Drive folder are added to https://asapcommercialdoors.com/charlotte/about-us/



  Team photo on https://asapcommercialdoors.com/ is replaced with the updated image labeled for this page in the Arizona Team Photos in the Drive folder


  • Team photo on the Arizona https://asapcommercialdoors.com/about-us/ is replaced with the updated arizona image labeled for this page in the Drive folder
  • Same employee removals, updates, and additions from the Charlotte About Us page are applied to https://asapcommercialdoors.com/about-us/
 

 
Deadline: by Friday if possible.

Assets and References:
  • Labeled Google Drive folder (all replacement images): https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1s7DkPoG_A1E2dbYdqIIIz1Lx1yjZUikN?usp=drive_link

title: Weekly GBP post from client
description:
Seeking help w/ the ticket we got below:

Please post this week's GBP post requests from the client. It's for jobs ASAP Commercial doors completed that are no longer being autoposted by PinParrot. The images for each post are titled with the GBP they belong to. 

 
PHOENIX GBP: 
High Lift Overhead Door Repair | Leak Secure
ASAP Commercial Doors recently completed an overhead door service call in Phoenix, AZ for a commercial facility on N. 24th Avenue. Our technicians responded to a 12x14 high lift overhead door that was stuck open and would not operate. Upon inspection, our team identified a missing roller in the top fixture and a slide lock wedged in the track between the vertical and high lift extension sections. After securing the top fixture with a replacement roller and removing the obstructing slide lock, the door was restored to operation. A full inspection revealed an incorrectly installed clevis and cotter pin on the bottom fixture. Our technicians back-wound the tension, removed and reinstalled the bottom fixture hardware correctly, re-tensioned the door, lubricated all friction points, and completed a full operational test. ASAP Commercial Doors provides expert overhead and high lift door repair services for commercial facilities throughout the Phoenix, AZ area.

GILBERT GBP:
Exterior Trim Repair & Lock Replacement | SonRise
ASAP Commercial Doors completed a commercial door hardware service call in Chandler, AZ for a facility on W. Gavelston Street. Our technicians removed three previously installed exterior trim pieces, installed repair plates to properly cover and seal the existing holes, and installed a new Marks M195 lever keyed alike to the customer's existing keys for seamless access continuity. ASAP Commercial Doors provides commercial door hardware repair, trim work, and lock installation services throughout the Gilbert, Chandler, and greater Phoenix metro area.

MOORESVILLE GBP:
Interior Door Replacement & Hardware Installation | LB Plastics
ASAP Commercial Doors completed a commercial door replacement in Mooresville, NC for an industrial facility on E. Plaza Drive. Our technicians removed the existing damaged door and installed a new door in the existing frame, mounted on new ball bearing hinges for smooth, long-lasting operation. A new door closer and passage lever set were also installed to complete the service. ASAP Commercial Doors provides commercial door replacement and hardware installation services for industrial and commercial facilities throughout Mooresville and the greater Lake Norman area.

CHARLOTTE  GBP:
Storefront & Interior Door Repairs | Poppy's Bagels
ASAP Commercial Doors recently completed a multi-door service call in Charlotte, NC for a retail food service facility on Providence Road. Our technicians addressed three doors across the location. On the main entrance, the existing door was removed, the pivots were taken off the door and frame, and the door was reinstalled on a full surface gear hinge in clear aluminum with adjustments made for smooth and safe operation. A door kick down in clear aluminum was installed on the side door and its operation was confirmed. The kitchen door was also inspected and its operation verified. All three storefront closers were inspected and confirmed to be in working condition. The new full surface gear hinge installation includes a 10-year factory warranty. ASAP Commercial Doors provides comprehensive storefront and commercial door repair and hardware installation services throughout Charlotte, NC.

 

Thanks!

title: Weekly GBP Update
description:
Seeking help w/ the ticket we got below:

Summary: ASAP Commercial Doors has provided completed service call summaries and photos for four locations (Phoenix, Gilbert, Charlotte, Mooresville) to be published to their respective Google Business Profiles. The raw client content has been rewritten into SEO and local search optimized copy for publishing. Please review the copy below and confirm it is optimized before publishing. Photos will be attached.

Client Goal: Have all four location GBP posts published using the optimized service call content and photos provided below.

Requirements for Completion:
  • GBP post copy is reviewed and confirmed as SEO optimized before publishing
  • GBP post is published for the Phoenix location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Gilbert location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Charlotte location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Mooresville location using the copy and photos provided below
  • AM is notified upon completion for client communication
Deadline:  Please have them posted within our normal ticket turn aorund time.

Post Copy:
Phoenix GBP
Storefront Door Repairs & Hardware Upgrades | Arizona Chapters National Safety Council

ASAP Commercial Doors recently completed a multi-service storefront door project in Phoenix, AZ for a commercial office facility on N. 31st Avenue. Our technicians removed and replaced the threshold on two side entrance storefront doors, fabricated and installed new lock rod hardware, and installed a heavy-duty closer with a top jamb mount to ensure slow, controlled closure. Slide locks were added to the non-active leaf to keep it securely fixed, and new exterior door sweeps were installed on both doors to prevent debris from entering the building. On the front entrance doors, our team removed and replaced two worn kick downs with new spring-loaded step kick downs. ASAP Commercial Doors provides comprehensive commercial door hardware installation and repair services throughout the Phoenix, AZ area.

Gilbert GBP: 
Sectional Door Section Replacement | Puretec Industrial Water

ASAP Commercial Doors completed a sectional door repair in Gilbert, AZ for an industrial facility on N. Hobson Street. Our technicians removed and replaced a damaged 12x12 door section on the west wall, including the installation of a new matching panel, rollers, lift cables, and hinges. The door system was fully adjusted, aligned, and balanced, followed by lubrication and operational testing to confirm smooth and safe function. ASAP Commercial Doors specializes in commercial and industrial sectional door repair and replacement throughout Gilbert and the greater Phoenix metro area.

Charlotte GBP:
Dock Leveler Service | Viking Facility

ASAP Commercial Doors completed a dock leveler service call in Charlotte, NC for a commercial facility on Cordage Street. Our technicians serviced the dock leveler to restore proper operation and ensure safe, efficient loading dock function. ASAP Commercial Doors provides professional dock leveler maintenance and repair services for commercial and industrial facilities throughout the Charlotte, NC region. 

 
Mooresville GBP
Automatic Bi-Part Sliding Door Installation | Indian Mart 

ASAP Commercial Doors completed an automatic door installation in Mooresville, NC for a retail facility on Commons Drive. Our technicians removed the existing single door and sidelights and furnished and installed a new DC USA automatic bi-parting sliding door system. The package features clear anodized aluminum framing with 1" insulated glass, exterior and interior sensors for activation and safety, and a standard hook bolt locking system. All automatic door work was completed by AAADM certified technicians and meets or exceeds the latest ANSI safety standards. An annual AAADM inspection will be required to maintain safety compliance. ASAP Commercial Doors provides expert automatic door installation and service throughout Mooresville and the greater Lake Norman area.

Assets and References:
  • Client-provided photos for all four locations - see attached.
  • Note: Client has flagged a concern about the Charlotte GBP listing implying a physical office presence. Charlotte posts should continue publishing for now. AM to follow up with GBP team regarding their concerns in a discussion post.
 

Thanks!

title: Publish GBP Posts for All Four Locations
description:
Seeking help w/ the client request please. 
 
Summary: ASAP Commercial Doors has canceled Pin Parrot and provided service call content and photos for four locations (Phoenix, Gilbert, Mooresville, Charlotte) to be published to their respective Google Business Profiles. The raw client content has been rewritten into SEO and local search optimized copy for publishing. Please review the copy below and confirm it is optimized before publishing. Photos will be attached.

Client Goal: Have all four location GBP posts published using the optimized service call content and photos provided below.

Requirements for Completion:
  • GBP post copy is reviewed and confirmed as SEO optimized before publishing
  • GBP post is published for the Phoenix location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Gilbert location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Mooresville location using the copy and photos provided below
  • GBP post is published for the Charlotte location using the copy and photos provided below

Deadline: No Specific Deadline provided, but let's try for at least a 48 hour turnaround. 

GBP Post Copy:

Phoenix GBP:
Sectional Door Repair | Doxim Facility 
ASAP Commercial Doors recently completed a commercial door service call in Phoenix, AZ at a facility located on E. Pinnacle Peak Road. Our technicians responded to a sectional door that would not close properly, securing the door and replacing worn spring bumpers to restore safe and reliable operation. Our team specializes in fast, professional commercial door repairs throughout the Phoenix area, keeping businesses running without interruption.

Gilbert  GBP: 
Sectional Door Roller & Cable Replacement | Puretec Industrial Water
ASAP Commercial Doors completed a sectional door repair in Gilbert, AZ for an industrial facility on N. Hobson Street. Our technicians removed and replaced damaged rollers and lift cables, inspected the drums and shaft, balanced and adjusted the door system, lubricated all moving components, and performed a full operational and safety test. The door was restored to safe, proper operation. ASAP Commercial Doors proudly serves commercial and industrial facilities throughout Gilbert and the greater Phoenix metro area with expert door repair and maintenance services.

Mooresville GBP:
Commercial Door Adjustment | Tru by Hilton
ASAP Commercial Doors completed a commercial door service call in Mooresville, NC for a hospitality facility on Alcove Road. Our technicians identified a door that was rubbing on the header and not closing fully. After inspecting the pivot hardware and confirming it was in good condition, we adjusted the bottom pivot and tested the door to confirm smooth, complete closure. ASAP Commercial Doors provides reliable commercial door repair and adjustment services throughout Mooresville and the surrounding North Carolina region. 

Charlotte  GBP: 
Glass & Aluminum Door Repair | Bright Horizons
ASAP Commercial Doors recently completed a commercial door repair in Charlotte, NC for a facility on Mallard Creek Road. Our technicians addressed a glass and aluminum door that was not latching or locking properly. We furnished and installed a direct replacement door unit, inspected all hardware for proper torque, and adjusted the door closer to ensure smooth, safe, and secure operation. ASAP Commercial Doors serves commercial facilities throughout Charlotte and the greater Mecklenburg County area with professional door installation and repair services.



Thanks!

title: GBP Phone Number Situation
description:
Hey ,

We have another situation here: we need to figure out the GBP phone numbers to ensure NAPW consistency as we improve the site's footer structure to add all locations and set up citations.

The site lists only two locations in the footer, both with phone numbers that are not associated with their GBPs, so not sure what these are either.


Can you please communicate with the appropriate contact:
- Confirm if the current phone numbers on each GBP are their respective unique local numbers.
- If not, get us a list of the correct local numbers to use for NAPW consistency across GBP (secondary if GBP tracking exists), site NAP in footer and respective location pages, Citations.

To not further delay the footer updates, as these are critical SEO elements that need to be addressed ASAP, we will proceed with using each of the GBPs' primary phone numbers in the site footer. But we can change this if needs be once the client gets back to us.

Phoenix
Number on Site in Footer - (833) 373-8761
GBP Primary - (833) 299-3888
GBP Secondary - n/a

Mooresville
Number on Site in Footer -  (980) 351-9710
GBP Primary - (980) 294-0324
GBP Secondary -  n/a

Gilbert AZ
Number on Site in Footer - n/a
GBP Primary - (480) 442-8918
GBP Secondary -  n/a

Charlotte
Number on Site in Footer - n/a 
GBP Primary - (980) 202-3660 
GBP Secondary -  n/a

title: Pin Parrot
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Corey V, Keith Bruss, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Hi Guys!

What's your recommendation on the client keeping PinParrot for the site? She says, the service says it's improved her GBP visibility, but she really has no way of knowing and its a cost that she's happy to part ways with, as it's a cost associated with each location, if we don't need it to support her GBP's.

title: 24 hours for GBP
assignees: Mikey King, Mubeen Dildar-Mia, Mvelo Nsibanyoni
description:
The client wants to know if it would be helpful to switch their GBP hours to reflect 24 hours.

They do not have LSA's and they are going to soon have Evoca AI answering calls for rollover calls and after hour calls. They can book, but they can't send a tech out.

description: , please update it as soon as this is completed, or let us know if it goes past your target date of completion. This task is to facilitate an "auto-trigger" for this. 😅 - not micromanage. ❤️

title: Thank you page
description:
hi!

Client Outcome:
The client is requesting a thank you page be created for better attribution post submissions from this landing page's form. This landing page is for meta ads.

I see that we have this thank you page already for the site.  https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/
Could we duplicate it and potentially update the copy if the client requests specific copy? 

Here's the original mention:
"I previously had our old marketing team create a landing page that I can use for meta ads. However, I wanted to see if we can add a thank you page after someone fills out the form so I can better track the lead. 

Here is the link to the page I am referring to: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/"

Let me know, thank you!

title: Items to be Addressed
description:
Hey ,

I have found a few issues with this client, and Clayton wanted me to list them out to you here so they are on your radar, and hash them out with the right people to get these things addressed.

I am listing the things I have found so far through our GBP audits, and after digging into why the client is stating Charlotte GBP has been pending verification for over 3 weeks now. (Which I think will more than likely turn into a suspension due to missing local signals and such)

Issues found so far:


Charlotte GBP -
- Currently using the homepage is currently only optimized for AZ not NC
FIXED - Updated GBP to use Charlotte lander
- no hours listed
FIXED - Added 7:30am to 5pm as site states
- Mooresville GBP has Charlotte listed in it's service area
FIXED - removed from Mooresville service areas and added to Charlotte

Footer -
Not all locations NAPW exist in footer
Task Created to Implement this - Footer Updates - J404 ASAP Commercial Doors

Phoenix Lander -
Another page exists for this location, but the GBP is currently using - https://asapcommercialdoors.com/service-areas/phoenix-az-2/
The other page is https://asapcommercialdoors.com/service-areas/phoenix-az/

Location Pages -
Location pages do not contain any local signals of NAPW and map embeds on them

description:
